subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath held fast to the Sure Handle in these days wherein eyes are blinded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی تمسک بالعروه الوثقی فی هذه الایام التی فیها عمت الابصار
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital
